case_data.taskList:
## Add application details / Ychwanegu manylion y cais
Type of application / Math o gais
Hearing urgency / Pa mor frys yw’r cais

## Add people to the case / Ychwanegu pobl i’r achos
If children live with another party in the case (other than the applicant or respondent) you can add these details to 'Other people in the case.' if you do complete this section, you must keep it up to date.
Os oes plant yn byw gyda’r parti arall yn yr achos (heblaw’r ceisydd neu’r atebydd), gallwch ychwanegu’r manylion hyn yn y blwch ‘Pobl eraill yn yr achos.’ Os ydych chi’n cwblhau’r adran hon, mae’n rhaid i chi gadw’r wybodaeth yn gyfredol.
Applicant details / Manylion y ceisydd
Respondent details / Manylion yr atebydd
Other people in the case / Pobl eraill yn yr achos
Child details / Manylion y plentyn
Other children not in the case / Plant eraill sydd ddim yn rhan o’r achos

## Relationships / Perthnasoedd
Ensure relationship of children with all people on the case is captured, before submitting the application.
Sicrhewch eich bod chi’n nodi sut fath o berthynas sydd gan y plant gyda’r holl bobl sy’n rhan o’r achos cyn i chi gyflwyno’r cais
Children and applicants / Plant a’r ceiswyr
Children and respondents / Plant a’r atebwyr
Children and other people / Plant a phobl eraill

## Add required details / Ychwanegu manylion angenrheidiol
Allegations of harm / Honiadau o niwed

## MIAM details / Manylion MIAM
Mediation Information and Assessment Meeting (MIAM) section is optional for final submission,if a consent order is uploaded and mandatory otherwise.
Mae llenwi’r adran Cyfarfod Asesu a Gwybodaeth am Gyfryngu (MIAM) yn ddewisol os bydd gorchymyn cydsynio’n cael ei uwchlwytho wrth gyflwyno’r cais terfynol. Fel arall mae’n rhaid ei llenwi.
MIAM / MIAM

## Add additional information / Ychwanegu gwybodaeth ychwanegol
Only complete if relevant / Llenwch yr adran hon dim ond os yw’n berthnasol
Other proceedings / Achosion eraill
Attending the hearing / Mynychu’r gwrandawiad
International element / Elfen ryngwladol
Litigation capacity / Capasiti cyfreitha
Welsh language requirements / Gofynion o ran yr iaith Gymraeg

## View PDF application / Gweld y cais PDF
View PDF application / Gweld y cais PDF

## Submit and pay / Cyflwyno a thalu
Submit and pay / Cyflwyno a thalu

typeOfApplicationTable.natureOfOrder: Requesting for spending time with the child twice a week
typeOfApplicationTable.ordersApplyingFor: Child Arrangements Order, Prohibited Steps Order, Specific Issue Order

allegationOfHarmRevised.typesOfHarmRevised: Domestic abuse, child abduction, child abuse, drugs, alcohol or substance abuse, safety or welfare concerns

declarationTable.declarationText: I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in its truth. The applicant believes that the facts stated in this form and any continuation sheets are true. PRL NOC Respondent Solicitor 4 is authorised by the applicant to sign this statement.

case_data.courtName: Swansea Civil And Family Justice Centre
case_data.applicationDetails: The reason being it could not be sorted by discussion. We request the court to help us to come to a decision.

allocatedJudgeDetails.courtName: Swansea Civil And Family Justice Centre

list_items.label: Family Presidents letter to parties - Welsh.pdf (21 Apr 2026 17:49)
Family Presidents letter to parties.pdf (21 Apr 2026 17:49)

miamPolicyUpgradeExemptionsTable.mpuUrgencyEvidence: There is risk to the life, liberty or physical safety of the prospective applicant or his or her family or his or her home.
miamPolicyUpgradeExemptionsTable.mpuOtherGroundsEvidence: (i) The prospective applicant is not able to attend a MIAM online or by video-link and an explanation of why this is the case is provided to the court using the text box provided; and (ii) the prospective applicant has contacted as many authorised family mediators as have an office within 15 miles of his or her home (or 5 of them if there are 5 or more mediators), and all of them have stated that they are not available to conduct a MIAM within 15 business days of the date of contact.
miamPolicyUpgradeExemptionsTable.mpuDomesticAbuseEvidence:
Evidence that a prospective party has been arrested for a relevant domestic abuse offence.
Evidence of a relevant police caution for a domestic abuse offence.
Evidence of relevant criminal proceedings for a domestic abuse offence which have not concluded.
miamPolicyUpgradeExemptionsTable.mpuChildProtectionEvidence: The subject of enquiries by a local authority under section 47 of the Children Act 1989 Act
miamPolicyUpgradeExemptionsTable.mpuReasonsForMiamExemption: Domestic abuse, Child protection concerns, Urgency, Previous attendance of a MIAM or non-court dispute resolution, Other
miamPolicyUpgradeExemptionsTable.mpuPreviousAttendenceEvidence: The application would be made in existing proceedings which are continuing and the prospective applicant attended a MIAM before initiating those proceedings. You will need to upload the mediator’s certificate. If you are the respondent in existing proceedings, provide the date of the MIAM alongside the name and contact details of the MIAM provider in the text area.

value.document_filename: Family Presidents letter to parties - Welsh.pdf
